title: Verify trial widget displays correctly on homepage for active trial
description: Test that the persistent trial widget displays accurate remaining days for users with active trial status
preconditions: User has an active trial with 6 days remaining

steps.description: 1. User logs in with valid credentials
3. Observe the trial widget in the header area

expected_result: Widget displays 'Trial Mode: 6 Days Remaining' with shield/clock icon and 'Manage Control Center' link
